query: SELECT i.id, i.deviceCode, i.modelType, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM instrumentChannels c WHERE c.instrumentId = i.id) as channelCount FROM weighingInstruments i ORDER BY i.deviceCode LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute SELECT i.id, i.deviceCode, i.modelType, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM instrumentChannels c WHERE c.instrumentId = i.id) as channelCount FROM weighingInstruments i ORDER BY i.deviceCode LIMIT 20;
